parameters.jsCode:
const invoiceData = $input.first().json.invoiceData;
const chatId = $input.first().json.userPhone;

return [{
  chat_id: chatId,
  client_name: invoiceData.client_name,
  client_dni: invoiceData.client_dni,
  client_address: invoiceData.client_address,
  client_country: invoiceData.client_country,
  client_country_code: invoiceData.client_country_code,
  client_cuit_country: invoiceData.client_cuit_country,
  invoice_description: invoiceData.invoice_description,
  invoice_amount: invoiceData.invoice_amount,
  invoice_quantity: invoiceData.invoice_quantity,
  invoice_date: invoiceData.invoice_date,
  payment_method: invoiceData.payment_method,
  payment_date: invoiceData.payment_date
}];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "environment": "dev",
  "method": "FEXAuthorize",
  "wsid": "wsfex",
  "params": {
    "Auth": {
      "Token": "{{ $('get_authorization').item.json.token }}",
      "Sign": "{{ $('get_authorization').item.json.sign }}",
      "Cuit": 20400832278
    },
    "Cmp": {
      "Id": 1,
      "Fecha_cbte": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_date }}",
      "Cbte_Tipo": 19,
      "Punto_vta": 2,
      "Cbte_nro": {{ $('get_last_voucher_number').item.json.FEXGetLast_IDResult.FEXResultGet.Id + 1 }},
      "Tipo_expo": 2,
      "Permiso_existente": "",
      "Dst_cmp": {{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.client_country_code }},
      "Cliente": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.client_name }}",
      "Cuit_pais_cliente": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.client_cuit_country }}",
      "Domicilio_cliente": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.client_address }}",
      "Moneda_Id": "DOL",
      "Moneda_ctz": {{ $('get_usd_exchange_rate').item.json.FEXGetPARAM_CtzResult.FEXResultGet.Mon_ctz }},
      "Imp_total": {{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_amount }},
      "Idioma_cbte": 1,
      "Forma_pago": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.payment_method }}",
      "Incoterms": "",
      "Incoterms_Ds": "",
      "Obs_comerciales": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_description }}",
      "Obs_generales": "",
      "Obs": "",
      "Cmps_asoc": [],
      "Fecha_pago": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.payment_date }}",
      "Items": {
        "Item": [
            {
              "Pro_ds": "{{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_description }}",
              "Pro_qty": {{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_quantity }},
              "Pro_umed": 7,
              "Pro_precio_uni": {{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_amount / $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_quantity }},
              "Pro_total_item": {{ $('Set Invoice Data').item.json.invoice_amount }}
            }
          ]
        }
    }
  }
}
